hero.description: Discover an ultra-luxury balnéotherapy experience — combining thermal mineral therapy, vinotherapy and deep-sea thalassotherapy in the tradition of classic French spas.

experience.label: Signature Rituals
experience.title: 4 signature
experience.description: Each ritual is crafted following the philosophy of French balnéotherapy — where water, minerals and fragrance combine to create magic.

treatments.label: Treatment menu
treatments.title: Our full
treatments.description: From thermal water therapy to French clay wraps — each treatment is a unique journey of relaxation.
